title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.

title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.

title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
summary: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.

title: Testing ads in ChatGPT
summary: OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, with clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control.

title: Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT
summary: Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected.

title: Simplex rethinks software development with Codex
summary: Simplex boosts software development with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex, reducing design, build, and testing time while scaling AI-driven workflows.

title: Secure short-term GPU capacity for ML workloads with EC2 Capacity Blocks for ML and SageMaker training plans
summary: In this post, you will learn how to secure reserved GPU capacity for short-term workloads using Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) Capacity Blocks for ML and Amazon SageMaker training plans. These solutions can address GPU availability challenges when you need short-term capacity for load testing, model validation, time-bound workshops, or preparing inference capacity ahead of a release.

title: Overcoming reward signal challenges: Verifiable rewards-based reinforcement learning with GRPO on SageMaker AI
summary: In this post, you will learn how to implement reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) to introduce verification and transparency into reward signals to improve training performance. This approach works best when outputs can be objectively verified for correctness, such as in mathematical reasoning, code generation, or symbolic manipulation tasks. You will also learn how to layer techniques like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and few-shot examples to further improve results. You’ll use the GSM8K dataset (Grade School Math 8K: a collection of grade school math problems) to improve math problem solving accuracy, but t...

title: Agents that transact: Introducing Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, built with Coinbase and Stripe
summary: Today, we're announcing a preview of Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Payments, a new set of features in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that enables AI agents to instantly access and pay for what they use. AgentCore Payments was developed in partnership with Coinbase and Stripe.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Improving Depth Anything V2 Robustness to Video Compression
QVAC MedPsy: State-of-the-Art Medical and Healthcare Language Models for Edge Devices
ElevenLabs expands presence in Australia and New Zealand
DeepSeek-R1 Release
Thinking Mode
introducing DeepSeek-V3
Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: AutoClaw launched
summary: Zhipu AI highlights AutoClaw as a new product that can be installed on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as part of the company's native product lineup.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: GLM-5-Turbo is introduced as a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-horizon execution. Zhipu says GLM-5 achieves open-source SOTA on agent coding benchmarks such as SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V released as an open-source visual reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI presents GLM-4.6V as a 100B-class open-source visual reasoning model with strong performance. The company also says it reaches same-scale SOTA visual understanding accuracy, supports native tool calling, and handles 128K context.

title: AutoGLM introduced as an autonomous agent model
summary: AutoGLM is described as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. Zhipu says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization while supporting continuous self-improvement.

title: GLM-5 flagship base model for agent engineering launched
summary: Zhipu AI describes GLM-5 as its new flagship base model for agent engineering. The company says it delivers open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as the base model for GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu AI says it proposed the GLM-OS concept and released the AutoGLM and GLM-PC agent products on November 29. To support the agent ecosystem, it open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model for GLM-PC, trained from GLM-4V-9B for specialized agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: GLM-OS concept unveiled with AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu AI says it formally introduced the GLM-OS concept and launched two agent products, AutoGLM and GLM-PC. The announcement positions them as part of the company's push to expand the large-model agent ecosystem.

title: Agent OpenDay updates: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At Zhipu's Agent OpenDay, the company announced that AutoGLM can autonomously execute more than 50-step workflows and perform tasks across apps, while also enabling fully automated web browsing on supported sites. It also said GLM-PC entered internal testing as a computer-operating agent product.

Seed3D 2.0 Released
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting higher precision and greater usability as improvements in the new release.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, designed for attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural voice interaction.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the opening of its 2027 Foundation Model campus recruitment program, including internship opportunities.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena as a new model preview announcement.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 as a new model release.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, emphasizing deeper thinking and more accurate generation.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0 as a new model release.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, focused on advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent it says marks the start of an era focused on delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames the product as a practical enterprise agent offering rather than a research demo.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification highlights external validation for the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure product.

title: Yi-Lightning introduced as a global SOTA Mixture-of-Experts LLM
summary: 01.AI highlights Yi-Lightning as a globally state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model. The page also labels it as part of the Yi open-source model lineup.
